snippet.title: The Parent Selector That Does Everything
snippet.description: Style any ancestor based on child state. The checkbox controls the entire card — background, shadows, rotation, spacing. Zero JavaScript.
snippet.demoMarkup: One checkbox controls background, glow, spacing, rotation, and color — all via :has(input:checked)
snippet.whyItWorks: Law of Proximity & Common Region — one control (checkbox) visually groups and updates the whole card, so the relationship is obvious.
